none.justification: Correctly identifies include/linux/container_of.h:18-23 as the kernel-used definition, quotes the full body, explains all three parameters, and reports the subtree-correct four other definitions with the right no-conflict rationale.

ccodegraph.justification: Matches the GT on the primary definition, macro body, parameters, and the subtree-scoped list of four other definitions. It also correctly distinguishes container_of_const from another container_of definition.

codegraph.justification: The primary definition, body, and parameter explanation are correct, and it finds most of the other copies. However it incorrectly says scripts/kconfig/list.h does not define container_of, despite the subtree GT listing scripts/kconfig/list.h:19 as one of the four other definitions.

cbm.justification: Correctly gives include/linux/container_of.h:18-23 with the full macro body and parameter explanation, and reports exactly the four subtree-relevant other definitions with plausible separate-build-domain conflict reasoning.
